_schema: SAS Viya Competitive Intelligence Dashboard v2.0

_instructions.threat: One of: CRITICAL | HIGH | MEDIUM-HIGH | MODERATE-HIGH | MODERATE | LOW | null (null = SAS itself)
_instructions.analystKeys: gartnerDSML | gartnerDecision | gartnerABI | forrester | idc | g2
_instructions.dimensions: Must match the 'dimensions' array order below

marketPriorities.label: GenAI / Agentic AI
marketPriorities.rationale: Gartner: 40% of apps will include agents by 2026; Forrester added 8 dedicated GenAI criteria in BI Wave

marketPriorities.label: Governance / Responsible AI
marketPriorities.rationale: Gartner Top Strategic Tech Trend 2026; IDC launched dedicated AI Governance MarketScape

marketPriorities.label: Model Development
marketPriorities.rationale: Core DSML evaluation criterion across all analyst frameworks

marketPriorities.label: MLOps / Deployment
marketPriorities.rationale: MLOps maturity is a primary DSML MQ evaluation axis

marketPriorities.label: Data Access / Integration
marketPriorities.rationale: Data connectivity breadth is a top buyer requirement per Gartner surveys

marketPriorities.label: Industry / Vertical Depth
marketPriorities.rationale: Domain-specific solutions increasingly cited as differentiation driver

marketPriorities.label: Decisioning
marketPriorities.rationale: Gartner launched dedicated Decision Intelligence MQ; growing buyer category

watchItems.title: Databricks IPO (H2 2026)
watchItems.detail: Will dramatically increase visibility, enterprise credibility, and capital. Prepare competitive retention materials before S-1 filing. Post-IPO Databricks with $5B+ revenue growing 65% will intensify pressure across every dimension.

watchItems.title: Dataiku IPO (H1 2026)
watchItems.detail: Reuters reported Dataiku hired Morgan Stanley and Citigroup. A direct DSML Leader competitor going public while SAS is Visionary creates an acute narrative problem for SAS sales teams.

watchItems.title: Altair RapidMiner + SAS Code Execution
watchItems.detail: Siemens' backing plus native SAS language compatibility explicitly targets SAS migration scenarios. Monitor Siemens go-to-market investment — this is the most direct installed-base threat.

watchItems.title: Microsoft Fabric Data Science Expansion
watchItems.detail: Fabric is already Leader in data fabric and BI. As data science capabilities mature, 30M+ Power BI users represent the largest 'good enough' analytics threat facing SAS.

watchItems.title: Palantir Financial Services Push via Accenture / Deloitte
watchItems.detail: Accenture Palantir Business Group (2,000+ skilled professionals) scaling commercial delivery. If partnerships expand into financial services risk/compliance — SAS's stronghold — the threat elevates significantly.

vendors.name: SAS Viya

analyst.forrester: Leader — AI/ML (Q3 2024); Leader — Real-Time Interaction Mgmt (Q1 2024)

vendors.genaiStatus: Viya Copilot GA Dec 2025 (Azure AI Foundry); Retrieval Agent Manager announced Oct 2025; Agentic AI Accelerator toolkit; SAS Intelligent Decisioning (LLM reasoning + rules + ML)
vendors.keyMove: Intelligent Decisioning GA (May 2025); Hazy acquisition (synthetic data, Nov 2024); Viya Copilot GA; Named Leader in inaugural Gartner Decision Intelligence MQ (Jan 2026)

vendors.name: Databricks

analyst.gartnerDSML: Leader #1 (2025) — highest Ability to Execute AND Completeness of Vision

vendors.genaiStatus: Agent Bricks (no-code agentic AI platform); Mosaic AI Gateway GA; $100M OpenAI partnership (GPT-5 native); 4-year Google Gemini partnership; MLflow 3.0 with prompt versioning; Storage-Optimized Vector Search (7x cheaper); MCP servers
vendors.keyMove: $134B valuation (Series L, Dec 2025); Lakebase GA on AWS (Feb 2026); Neon acquisition $1B (May 2025); DAIS 2025 — 22,000+ attendees; IPO expected H2 2026; >$5.4B ARR growing 65%+ YoY
vendors.threatVector: #1 DSML MQ while SAS is Visionary; overwhelming market momentum; most comprehensive GenAI platform; open-source developer gravity (Apache Spark 2B+ downloads, MLflow most-used ML lifecycle tool)
vendors.sasAdvantage: Statistical depth (50+ years of proprietary algorithms), regulated industry compliance (Basel, IFRS, FDA), SAS Intelligent Decisioning (no Databricks equivalent), fraud/AML solutions (Forrester Leader), on-premises deployment (Databricks cloud-only)

vendors.name: Palantir

analyst.idc: #1 Worldwide AI Software Platform market share

vendors.genaiStatus: AIP Agent Studio; AIP Logic; AIP Analyst; AI FDE beta (Nov 2025); 1,500+ AIP Bootcamps completed; Ontology-grounded agentic AI with operational action execution
vendors.keyMove: $10B U.S. Army Enterprise Agreement (Jul 2025); FedRAMP High authorization (Dec 2024); Q4 2025 revenue +70% YoY; $300–490B market cap; participation in $185B Golden Dome missile defense
vendors.threatVector: AIP/agentic AI redefining category from 'analytics' to 'AI operating system'; government dominance at scale SAS cannot match; ontology-driven operational AI vs. SAS analytics-first model; AIP Bootcamps compress sales cycles from months to days
vendors.sasAdvantage: Statistical modeling depth, banking/insurance regulatory compliance (Basel/IFRS/Solvency — no Palantir equivalent), pricing accessibility (Palantir deals $5M–$100M+), international commercial penetration (Palantir intl. commercial grew only 2.5% FY2025)

vendors.name: Snowflake
vendors.genaiStatus: Cortex Agents GA (Nov 2025); Snowflake Intelligence GA (Dec 2025); Cortex AI Functions GA; GPT-5.2 integration via Cortex; AI use cases = 25% of implementations and 50% of new customer acquisitions
vendors.keyMove: Crunchy Data acquisition (~$250M, Jun 2025 — adds PostgreSQL operational DB); Advanced from Challenger to Leader in Gartner Cloud DBMS MQ; 100+ feature announcements at Summit 2025
vendors.threatVector: Platform gravity: enterprises building analytics natively on Snowflake via Cortex AI rather than licensing SAS; 13,300+ customers; expanding from warehousing into operational databases
vendors.sasAdvantage: Statistical modeling depth, SAS Intelligent Decisioning, fraud/risk/AML solutions, on-premises deployment (Snowflake cloud-only), regulatory domain expertise, model risk management

vendors.name: Dataiku

analyst.gartnerDSML: Leader (2025 — 4th consecutive year); #1 Product Owner use case in Critical Capabilities
analyst.g2: 4.8/5 (288 reviews); Customers' Choice; 96% Willingness to Recommend

vendors.genaiStatus: LLM Mesh (comprehensive LLM gateway); Agent Hub (Apr 2025) with Safe Guard, Quality Guard, Cost Guard; EU AI Act readiness framework in Dataiku Govern; multi-persona platform
vendors.keyMove: IPO preparation (Morgan Stanley + Citigroup reportedly hired, H1 2026 target); Customers' Choice recognition; #1 Product Owner use case in Gartner CC; Leader 4th consecutive year while SAS dropped to Visionary
vendors.threatVector: Direct DSML competitor — Leader in same MQ where SAS is Visionary; governance-first positioning resonates with regulated enterprises; multi-persona approach captures data engineers, scientists, and business analysts; potential IPO would amplify visibility
vendors.sasAdvantage: Statistical algorithm heritage, SAS Intelligent Decisioning (no Dataiku equivalent), industry-specific solutions (fraud, AML, credit risk, clinical trials, model risk management), deep enterprise relationships in regulated industries

vendors.name: Alteryx
vendors.revenue: Private (Clearlake Capital / Insight Partners, $4.4B buyout Mar 2024)
vendors.genaiStatus: AiDIN AI engine; multi-LLM support (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini); Alteryx One Platform launched May 2025 with GenAI integration
vendors.keyMove: Taken private $4.4B (Mar 2024); new CEO Andy MacMillan repositioning as 'AI Data Clearinghouse'; Alteryx One Platform unifying cloud and desktop (May 2025); fastest implementation time in G2 category (3.86 months)
vendors.threatVector: Self-service analytics and citizen data science ease-of-use advantages; lower entry pricing ($5,195/user/year vs. SAS enterprise); 'AI Data Clearinghouse' repositioning may capture mid-market SAS prospects
vendors.sasAdvantage: Enterprise ML depth, statistical rigor, SAS Intelligent Decisioning, governance for regulated industries, scale, breadth of industry solutions

vendors.name: H2O.ai
vendors.genaiStatus: h2oGPTe achieved #1 on GAIA benchmark (75% accuracy, Mar 2025) — outperformed Google, Microsoft, and Hugging Face; agentic AI features launched May 2025; sovereign AI for air-gapped/on-prem deployment validated on Dell AI Factory with NVIDIA
vendors.keyMove: #1 GAIA benchmark (Mar 2025); Dell AI Factory validation; AT&T 90% cost reduction in call center operations via H2O.ai; Commonwealth Bank and Progressive Insurance customer references
vendors.threatVector: Best-in-class AutoML (Driverless AI); sovereign AI messaging resonates in banking, telecom, and government where SAS competes; open-source H2O-3 creates developer entry point; GAIA benchmark win credibility
vendors.sasAdvantage: Platform breadth, SAS Intelligent Decisioning, domain-specific industry solutions, BI/reporting capabilities, enterprise scale and support, 40+ years of regulated industry credibility

vendors.name: Altair RapidMiner
vendors.genaiStatus: AI Studio with agent frameworks and GenAI integration; native SAS language execution (one of only two platforms with this capability); explicit SAS migration tooling
vendors.keyMove: Siemens $10.6B acquisition completed Mar 2025; Altair AI Studio native SAS code compatibility; Leader in Gartner DSML MQ while SAS is Visionary; access to Siemens $75.9B enterprise customer base
vendors.threatVector: Only competitor with native SAS language execution — explicitly designed to capture SAS migration scenarios; Siemens $10.6B backing provides resources to scale; Leader in same DSML MQ where SAS is Visionary
vendors.sasAdvantage: Domain-specific regulatory compliance products, SAS Intelligent Decisioning, brand recognition in banking/insurance/healthcare, global support infrastructure, proven enterprise scale

vendors.name: Tableau (Salesforce)

analyst.forrester: Leader — BI Platforms (Q2 2025): 'gold standard for data visualization'

vendors.genaiStatus: Tableau Next GA (Apr 2025) — agentic analytics platform with 3 agentic skills (Data Pro, Concierge, Inspector) powered by Salesforce Agentforce; Tableau Semantics GA (AI-powered semantic layer); Tableau Agent for conversational analytics across Desktop, Cloud, Server
vendors.keyMove: Tableau Next GA (Apr 2025); TC25 conference; deep Salesforce Data Cloud + CRM integration; Agentforce powering AI capabilities; Creator pricing $75–$115/user/month
vendors.threatVector: 'Gold standard' visualization; Salesforce CRM-to-insights pipeline SAS cannot match; Tableau Next agentic platform competing in analytical AI; massive installed base (9,227+ G2 reviews reflects market depth)
vendors.sasAdvantage: Advanced statistical modeling, ML pipelines, SAS Intelligent Decisioning, fraud/risk/AML solutions, model risk management, regulated industry compliance, deployment flexibility

vendors.name: Power BI / Microsoft Fabric

analyst.gartnerABI: Leader #1 (2025 — 18th consecutive year); 30M+ monthly active users
analyst.forrester: Leader — BI (Q2 2025, #1 GenAI in BI Wave); Leader — Data Fabric (Q4 2025, highest Current Offering AND Strategy)

vendors.genaiStatus: Copilot GA across Microsoft Fabric (data engineering, warehousing, data science, BI); #1 GenAI score in Forrester BI Wave; AI-powered semantic models; natural language query across 30M+ user base
vendors.keyMove: Microsoft Fabric — unified SaaS platform replacing Power BI Premium; named Leader in Forrester Data Fabric Wave (Q4 2025) with highest scores; Fabric expanding into data science workloads; Power BI Pro at $14/user/month
vendors.threatVector: #1 ABI MQ for 18 consecutive years; 30M+ monthly active users = largest 'good enough' analytics installed base; $14/month pricing creates dramatic TCO advantage; Fabric expanding into data science encroaches on SAS territory
vendors.sasAdvantage: Advanced statistical modeling, SAS Intelligent Decisioning (no Fabric equivalent), fraud/AML/risk solutions, model risk management for regulated industries, vertical solutions depth, deployment flexibility (SAS supports on-prem/air-gapped; Fabric is SaaS-only)

vendors.name: Qlik

analyst.idc: Leader — Data Integration Tools (10th consecutive year)

vendors.genaiStatus: Qlik Answers (NLQ/conversational analytics assistant); Qlik Staige (AI/ML integration layer); AutoML capabilities via Qlik Cloud; Open Lakehouse managed Apache Iceberg solution
vendors.keyMove: Dual Gartner Leader unique status — ABI Platforms AND Data Integration Tools; Qlik Open Lakehouse GA (Sep 2025, 2.5–5x faster queries, up to 50% lower infrastructure costs); Talend integration for CDC/real-time 200+ sources
vendors.threatVector: Unique dual Gartner Leader status in BI and Data Integration — competes with SAS data management solutions; associative engine enables free-form data exploration; CDC and real-time data movement depth
vendors.sasAdvantage: Advanced statistical modeling and ML depth, SAS Intelligent Decisioning, vertical industry solutions, fraud/risk/AML, model risk management, broader platform breadth

vendors.name: IBM SPSS Statistics

analyst.gartnerDSML: Not evaluated (IBM watsonx is Leader, separate product)

vendors.genaiStatus: AI Output Assistant (watsonx-powered) added in SPSS Statistics 31 (Jun 2025) — LLM-powered plain-language explanations of SPSS output only. No agentic features.
vendors.keyMove: SPSS Statistics 31 (Jun 2025); AI Output Assistant addition; IBM's strategic AI investment concentrated on watsonx — SPSS appears to be in 'maintain and harvest' mode. $105/user/month base subscription.
vendors.threatVector: Academic and research market penetration; point-and-click ease for non-programmers; IBM watsonx halo effect; 922 G2 reviews suggest meaningful installed base
vendors.sasAdvantage: Cloud-native platform, MLOps, model governance, SAS Intelligent Decisioning, enterprise scale, GenAI integration, vertical industry solutions, deployment flexibility

vendors.name: Stata
vendors.genaiStatus: None — no GenAI or agentic AI features announced as of April 2026.
vendors.keyMove: Stata 19 (Apr 2025): H2OML Suite (gradient boosting, random forests — first major ML capability ever added), CATE for treatment-effect heterogeneity, HDFE for high-dimensional fixed effects, Bayesian variable selection. Student pricing from $48/6 months.
vendors.threatVector: Econometrics, epidemiology, and social science academic dominance; World Bank / IMF institutional usage; affordable pricing; students trained on Stata are less likely to adopt SAS
vendors.sasAdvantage: Enterprise capabilities, cloud platform, AI/ML breadth, production deployment, model governance, BI/reporting, vendor support scale, GenAI integration

vendors.name: MATLAB (MathWorks)
vendors.genaiStatus: MATLAB Copilot (GPT-5 mini powered) for code generation, explanation, and improvement in R2025a/b; expanded GPU support (1,256 functions across 17 toolboxes); C/C++ code generation from Classification/Regression Learner apps
vendors.keyMove: R2025a/b with MATLAB Copilot; deep learning toolbox expansion; engineering/simulation remains core. Competes in automotive, aerospace, defense, telecom, semiconductor — fundamentally different base from SAS.
vendors.threatVector: Engineering and simulation market dominance; deep learning toolbox for technical computing; embedded/hardware deployment from MATLAB models; MATLAB Copilot expanding accessibility
vendors.sasAdvantage: Enterprise analytics and BI, SAS Intelligent Decisioning, data management, non-engineering verticals (banking, healthcare, insurance, government), model risk management, deployment governance

timeline.event: $10.6B acquisition agreement signed
Hazy acquisition (synthetic data) — accelerates SAS Data Maker
Series J: $10B at $62B valuation — pre-IPO war chest
FedRAMP High authorization (full suite) — most sensitive government workloads
Viya Essentials packaged cloud offering launched
h2oGPTe #1 on GAIA benchmark (75%) — outperforms Google, Microsoft, Hugging Face
Siemens $10.6B acquisition of Altair completed
Tableau Next GA — agentic analytics platform with Agentforce-powered skills
AI Agents with Dataiku launched — Agent Hub with Safe/Quality/Cost Guard
Intelligent Decisioning GA; Agentic AI Accelerator; SAS Innovate 2025
Neon acquisition ($1B) — foundation for Lakebase OLTP database
2025 DSML MQ published — SAS drops to Visionary; Databricks #1 Leader
DAIS 2025 (22,000+ attendees): Agent Bricks, Lakebase, MLflow 3.0, Databricks One
Summit 2025: 100+ features; Crunchy Data acquisition (~$250M)
$10B U.S. Army Enterprise Agreement — largest single government contract
$100M OpenAI partnership — GPT-5 native in Agent Bricks
Open Lakehouse GA — managed Apache Iceberg, 2.5–5x faster, 50% lower cost
Retrieval Agent Manager (RAM) announced — enterprise RAG and agentic workflows
Cortex Agents GA; Cortex AI Functions GA — production agentic AI on data platform
Viya Copilot GA (2025.12 release) — AI assistant in Model Studio, Model Manager, VS Code
Series L at $134B — revenue >$4.8B, 55% YoY; IPO preparation confirmed
SAS named Leader in inaugural Gartner MQ for Decision Intelligence Platforms
Lakebase GA on AWS; revenue >$5.4B, >65% YoY; $5B equity + $2B debt completed
SAS Innovate 2026 (Apr 27–30) — announcements pending
